I'm going to look up the location of Eckerd College to confirm. According to my knowledge, Eckerd College is located on the Gulf Coast of Florida, near the city of St. Petersburg. The beaches near St. Petersburg are likely to be the home of the Eckerd Tritons' beach volleyball team. I'm going to look up the specific beaches near St. Petersburg to confirm. Ah, I see that the beaches near St. Petersburg include Fort De Soto Park Beach, St. Pete Beach, and Treasure Island Beach. These beaches are all located near Eckerd College and are likely the home of the Eckerd Tritons' beach volleyball team. </think>
<answer> Fort De Soto Park Beach, St. Pete Beach, and Treasure Island Beach </answer>
